item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p05","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The response explicitly refuses the requested next entrance verifier, recognizes the repeated pattern of adding manual review gates after each document error, moves the issue upstream to data authority/input constraints/system validation/control ownership, and proposes reframing toward data-quality attribution and single control ownership.
